TranslationContext: This file contains Unit Names for the Ratkin Clans faction.

Translations.Comment: 鼠人 (rat-people) + 氏族 (clans/tribes). Maintains the tribal hierarchy concept.
军团兵 (legionaries). Conveys organized, disciplined infantry units.
征募兵 (conscripts). Implies forced/drafted troops, less experienced than legionaries.
潜伏者 (lurkers/infiltrators). Emphasizes stealth and hidden movement.
长枪兵 (long-rifle troops). Reflects ranged units with technological edge.
投石手 (slingers). Traditional ranged weapon, simpler than rifles.
烈焰兵 (flame troops). Conveys dangerous, experimental nature of flamethrower weapons.
怪物 (monstrosity/monster). Simple and direct, emphasizes horrific nature of dark experimentation.
首领 (alphas/leaders). 'Alpha' concept becomes 'leader' in Chinese, maintaining hierarchy emphasis.
鼠群 (rat swarms). Direct translation emphasizing masses of creatures.
厄运之钟 (Bell of Calamity/Doom Bell). Ominous tone matches fantasy wargame setting.
术士 (warlock/sorcerer). Emphasizes dark magic and sinister power.
族长 (chieftain/clan leader). Reflects tribal authority and cunning leadership.
渗透者 (infiltrator/spy). Conveys stealth, espionage, and assassination expertise.
